title: This Sector With Dependable, Big Dividends Likely Will Dodge the Bear Market
text: The liquidity party punch bowl is gone and will not be returning any time soon. Profligate and wasteful government spending, and way too much liquidity as rates were kept near or at zero for years, has created an inflation monster, and a Federal Reserve that is way behind the curve had no choice but come out blasting this month.

title: Atmos Energy (ATO) Benefits From Investment & Debt Management
text: Atmos Energy (ATO), with systematic investments to upgrade infrastructure and proper debt management, is poised for growth. However, a competitive industry and dependence on a single state are headwinds.

title: Atmos Energy Corporation Names John C. Ale to Board of Directors
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Atmos Energy Corporation (NYSE: ATO) announced today that John C. Ale has been elected to its board of directors. His election, effective June 1, 2022, will increase the size of the board to 11 directors. Ale was formerly Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary of Southwestern Energy Company, an independent energy company engaged in natural gas, natural gas liquids and oil exploration, development, production and marketing. title: 4 Gas Distribution Stocks to Watch Amid Industry Woes
text: The near-term prospects of the Zacks Gas Distribution industry look challenging. The gradual improvement in production and demand for natural gas will drive the performance of SRE, ATO, NFG and NJR.
